original_statement: how many competitors had more than 100 points?
mutated_statement: how many entities experienced more than some amount?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Verb substitution + Quantifier generalization + Unit deletion: "competitors" → "entities" (competitors→entities) | "had" → "experienced" (had→experienced) | "more than 100 points" → "more than some amount" (100→some amount; "points" removed)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，反问用户
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought与critique中的表述识别关键信息：critique指出“Step 2 假设‘some amount’为零且未证明”为不当假设，after_refine 的 judge_thought 明确写道“‘more than some amount’ 未指定阈值……无法确定”。Agent 的具体表现是：初始迭代给出具体数字24（猜测），但在被批评后在after_refine中修改为“Cannot be determined”，并明确指出需要具体阈值或指标才能计数。因为Agent最终识别并明确说明问题模糊、无法在缺少关键信息下回答，所以归类为“意识到目标模糊，反问用户/要求澄清”类别。
